description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring six curved arms radiating from a central stem, each arm supporting a cylindrical lampshade. The shades are light-colored with a subtle geometric pattern, likely fabric or textured material, and the arms and central structure are finished in a muted, off-white or cream color with a glossy sheen. The fixture is suspended from a decorative chain and ceiling mount, both matching the main body in color and finish. The arms are symmetrically arranged, giving the sconce a balanced and elegant appearance. The overall design is classic with a touch of modernity, suitable for upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, hallways, or dining areas. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the frame and fabric or composite for the shades.
description: A six-arm chandelier sconce with light-patterned cylindrical shades and a glossy, cream-colored metal frame, suspended by a decorative chain. The design is elegant and symmetrical, blending classic and modern elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and shades symmetrically arranged, with the central stem and chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the shades, with three shades more prominently visible.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the full symmetry and arrangement of the arms and shades.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite angle of view 1, again emphasizing the arm curvature and shade depth.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a classic chandelier silhouette with a modern twist, characterized by clean lines, subtle geometric patterns on the shades, and a glossy cream finish. The design blends traditional elegance with contemporary simplicity.
